_meta.description: Image-generation prompts per section (prompt §17). Generate OFFLINE, store as WebP/AVIF ≤200KB. Ensure ethnic diversity (SG multiracial).
_meta.styleAnchor: soft watercolour, calming lavender/sage/peach palette, rounded friendly forms, gentle lighting

prompts.homepageTrimester: Soft watercolour illustration of a pregnancy stage, calming lavender and sage palette, hopeful and warm, no text
prompts.hospitalsSketch: Watercolour architectural sketch of a modern hospital exterior, soft light, welcoming
prompts.benefitsIcons: Cute flat infographic icons — piggy bank, coins, family — pastel palette, rounded
prompts.exercise: Diverse pregnant women doing gentle prenatal exercise, inclusive, warm, watercolour
prompts.music: Whimsical illustration of a baby in the womb surrounded by soft musical notes
prompts.fathersGuide: Fathers in caregiving roles — holding a newborn, preparing a nursery — warm and diverse
prompts.multiples: Twin/triplet themed warm illustration, cots and small strollers, gentle
prompts.lossSupport: Gentle, muted, abstract comfort imagery — soft shapes, no babies, desaturated
prompts.mascotBase: Friendly baby elephant mascot, simple rounded shapes, soft lavender, kind expression
